name: aircot

metadata.name: aircot
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License
metadata.summary: Software for classifying aircraft within TAK.

documentation:
![ATAK screenshot with PyTAK logo.](https://aircot.readthedocs.io/en/latest/media/atak_screenshot_with_pytak_logo-x25.png)

# Classify aircraft in TAK

AirCOT is software for classifying aircraft within the Team Awareness Kit (TAK) ecosystem of products.

AirCOT is used by these TAK compatible products:

1. [ADSBCOT](https://github.com/snstac/adsbcot) is software for monitoring and analyzing aviation surveillance data via the Team Awareness Kit (TAK) ecosystem of products.
2. [AirTAK](https://www.snstac.com/airtak) is a low SWaP-C device for monitoring and analyzing aviation surveillance data via the Team Awareness Kit (TAK) ecosystem of products. 

[Documentation is available here](https://aircot.rtfd.io)

functions.name: aircot.functions.lookup_country
documentation: Lookup ICAO within each country range and return the associated country.

functions.name: aircot.functions.dolphin
documentation:
Classify an aircraft as USCG Dolphin.

MH-65D Dolphins out of Air Station SF use older ADS-B, but luckily have a similar
"flight" name.

For example:
* C6540 / AE2682 https://globe.adsbexchange.com/?icao=ae2682
* C6604 / AE26BB https://globe.adsbexchange.com/?icao=ae26bb
TODO: Pull this out into a custom csv or txt file of known aircraft you want to
assign a specific CoT type based on
FlightID AND/OR ICAO HEX address.

functions.name: aircot.functions.adsb_to_cot_type
documentation:
Classify Cursor on Target Event Type from ICAO address (binary, decimal, octal, or hex; and if available, from
ADS-B DO-260B or GDL90 Emitter Category & Flight ID.
flight ID is limited to 8 digits in the DO-260B specification

functions.name: aircot.functions.cot_type_from_category
documentation: Determine the CoT Event Type from the given ADS-B Category.

functions.name: aircot.functions.is_dolphin
documentation: Call dolphin() with cot type and flight.

functions.name: aircot.functions.get_icao_range
documentation: Gets a List of known 'friendly' ICAO Ranges of a given type (CIV|MIL).

functions.name: aircot.functions.icao_in_known_range
documentation: Determine if the given ICAO is within a known 'friendly' ICAO Range.

functions.name: aircot.functions.set_friendly_mil
documentation: Set Affiliation and Attitude for 'friendly' Military ICAOs.

functions.name: aircot.functions.set_neutral_civ
documentation: Set Affiliation and Attitude for known 'neutral' Civilian ICAOs.

functions.name: aircot.functions.is_known_country_icao
documentation: Determine if the given ICAO is from a known country.

functions.name: aircot.functions.get_civ
documentation: Get a List of Known 'friendly' Civilian ICAO Ranges.

functions.name: aircot.functions.is_civ
documentation: Determine if the given ICAO is within the 'Civilian' ICAO ranges.

functions.name: aircot.functions.is_tw
documentation: Determine if the given ICAO is from the Taiwan range.

functions.name: aircot.functions.set_domestic_us
documentation: Set the COT Attitude to neutral if the flight is from a known domestic US airline.
TODO: Eliminate this if section, as it will already be coded as neutral civil cot
type if left alone which fits the cot framework.

functions.name: aircot.functions.get_hae
documentation:
Calculate the height above ellipsoid HAE in meters for the given geometric altitude in feet.

```
param alt_geom

geometric (GNSS / INS) altitude in feet referenced to the WGS84 ellipsoid.
```

functions.name: aircot.functions.set_name_callsign
documentation:
Set the Name and Callsign in the COT Event.
Populates the fields with ICAO, Reg, Craft Type and Flight data, if available.

functions.name: aircot.functions.set_category
documentation: Set the category for the given aircraft if a transform exists in known_craft.

functions.name: aircot.functions.set_cot_type
documentation: Set the COT Type for the given aircraft if a transform exists in known_craft.

functions.name: aircot.functions.icao_int_to_hex
documentation: Convert ICAO from integer to hexidecimal.

functions.name: aircot.functions.capitalize
documentation: Capitlize the keys in the given dict.

functions.name: aircot.functions.read_known_craft
documentation: Reads the FILTER_CSV file into a `list`

functions.name: aircot.functions.get_known_craft
documentation: Get the known craft 'data transform' from the known craft db.
